title: FeatherMorphClient
description: A client integration mod for the FeatherMorph plugin
body:
See [the plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/feathermorph). ![cover](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorphClient/master/assets/cover.png)

Client integration for FeatherMorph

[![GH Actions](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/MorphPluginClient/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorphClient/actions) [![Latest Release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/XiaMoZhiShi/MorphPluginClient.svg)](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorphClient/releases/latest) [Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/feathermorph) | [Plugin Wiki (WIP)](https://github.com/XiaMoZhiShi/FeatherMorph/wiki)
## Features - Graphical disguise selection - Action keybinds - Better experience with boundingbox modification - Changes camera height to match the current disguise - Notification toasts for Disguise Unlock/Lost or exchange requests ## Keybinds ![Keybinds](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/I5NIj6Y1/images/fb65ac28a9a3fcc6b3db7260fcdf376d42d969ce.png)
